questions: You mention Claude deployed v1 instead of v2 without telling you, and you weren't happy at first—what changed your mind about shipping the simpler version?

The Teams webhook only took 10 minutes to set up but immediately created a backlog of enhancement requests from your team. How did that feel—validation that people wanted this, or pressure to keep building?

You say Week 5 'broke the pattern' by going wider instead of deeper after four weeks of building technical depth. Do you think you'll keep alternating between deep and wide work, or was this a one-time shift?
